title: gentiana pubigera subsp. pubigera
intro: Gentiana pubigera subsp. pubigera, also known as the bearded gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana pubigera subsp. pubigera include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to create teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
